mapper.select: /* AdminPotholeMapper.selectImsPotholeCount - 현장관리 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pothole p LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_cd = p.site_cd AND s.del_yn = 'N' WHERE 1=1 AND p.del_yn = 'N'

if.test: strtDt != null and strtDt != '' and endDt != null and endDt != ''

sql.if: AND ( p.report_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.process_note LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.detail_info LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.sta_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.sta_ref_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
/* 접수내용 상세보기 */
SELECT p.report_no AS reportNo, p.status_cd AS statusCd, cc.cd_code_nm AS statusNm, p.site_cd AS siteCd, s.site_name AS siteName, s.parent_site_cd AS parentSiteCd, p.direction_cd AS directionCd, p.addr AS addr, p.detail_info AS detailInfo, p.delivery_note AS deliveryNote, p.pavement_type_cds AS pavementTypeCds, p.occur_place_cds AS occurPlaceCds, p.receiver_id AS receiverId, r.USER_NM AS receiverNm, p.manager_id AS managerId, m.USER_NM AS managerNm, DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reportDate, DATE_FORMAT(p.work_start_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS workStartAt, DATE_FORMAT(p.work_end_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS workEndAt, p.process_note AS processNote, p.sta_meters AS staMeters, p.sta_km_decimal AS staKmDecimal, FORMAT(p.sta_km_decimal, 3) AS staKmDecimalText, p.sta_text AS staText, p.sta_ref_name AS staRefName, p.lat AS lat, p.lng AS lng, p.accuracy_m AS accuracyM, p.captured_at AS capturedAt, p.captured_ts AS capturedTs, p.weather_cd AS weatherCd, p.temp AS temp, p.work_temp AS workTemp, p.work_weather_cd AS workWeatherCd, cc1.cd_code_nm AS weatherNm, cc2.cd_code_nm AS workWeatherNm, p.receipt_gb_cd AS receiptGbCd, p.doc_no AS docNo, p.lane_info AS laneInfo, p.report_remark AS reportRemark, p.work_qty AS workQty, p.convert_work_qty AS convertWorkQty, p.account_work_qty AS accountWorkQty FROM pothole p LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_cd = p.site_cd AND s.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div='005' AND cc.use_yn='Y' AND cc.cd_code=p.status_cd LEFT JOIN cd_common cc1 ON cc1.cd_div='007' AND cc1.use_yn='Y' AND cc1.cd_code=p.weather_cd LEFT JOIN cd_common cc2 ON cc2.cd_div='007' AND cc2.use_yn='Y' AND cc2.cd_code=p.work_weather_cd LEFT JOIN admin_user r ON r.USER_ID = p.receiver_id AND r.USE_YN = 1 LEFT JOIN admin_user m ON m.USER_ID = p.manager_id AND m.USE_YN = 1 WHERE p.report_no = #{value} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.update:
/* AdminPotholeMapper.updatePotholeAll - 현장관리 접수/작업 정보 수정 */ UPDATE pothole
receiver_id = #{receiverId},
report_date = #{reportDate},
direction_cd = #{directionCd},
detail_info = #{detailInfo},
delivery_note = #{deliveryNote},
process_note = #{processNote},
addr = #{addr},
weather_cd = #{weatherCd},
work_weather_cd = #{workWeatherCd},
lat = #{lat},
lng = #{lng},
accuracy_m = #{accuracyM},
captured_at = #{capturedAt},
captured_ts = #{capturedTs},
site_cd = #{siteCd},
receipt_gb_cd = #{receiptGbCd},
sta_meters = #{staMeters},
sta_km_decimal = #{staKmDecimal},
sta_text = #{staText},
manager_id = #{managerId},
pavement_type_cds = #{pavementTypeCds},
occur_place_cds = #{occurPlaceCds},
lane_info = #{laneInfo},
report_remark = #{reportRemark},
work_qty = #{workQty},
convert_work_qty = #{convertWorkQty},
account_work_qty = #{accountWorkQty},
work_start_at = #{workStartAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
work_end_at = #{workEndAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
work_end_at = IFNULL(work_end_at, NOW()),
status_cd = #{statusCd},
temp = #{temp},
work_temp = #{workTemp},
update_datetime = NOW()
, update_ip = #{updateIp}
WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
mapper.insert:
/* AdminPotholeMapper.insertPotholeAll - 현장관리 접수 정보 등록 */
INSERT INTO pothole
report_no, doc_no, report_date, status_cd, site_cd, admin_site_cd,
pavement_type_cds, occur_place_cds,
lat, lng, accuracy_m, captured_at, captured_ts,
addr, cell_phone,
detail_info, delivery_note, receiver_id,
receipt_gb_cd,
process_note, manager_id, direction_cd, weather_cd, work_weather_cd,
lane_info, report_remark, work_qty, convert_work_qty, account_work_qty,
sta_meters, sta_km_decimal, sta_text,
work_start_at,
work_end_at,
reg_datetime, temp, work_temp
#{reportNo}, #{docNo}, #{reportDate}, #{statusCd},
#{siteCd}, #{adminSiteCd},
#{pavementTypeCds}, #{occurPlaceCds},
#{lat}, #{lng}, #{accuracyM}, #{capturedAt}, #{capturedTs},
#{addr},
HEX(AES_ENCRYPT(#{cellPhone}, 'RSOS')),
#{detailInfo}, #{deliveryNote}, #{receiverId},
#{receiptGbCd} 'POTHOLE' ,
#{processNote}, #{managerId}, #{directionCd}, #{weatherCd}, #{workWeatherCd},
#{laneInfo}, #{reportRemark}, #{workQty}, #{convertWorkQty}, #{accountWorkQty},
#{staMeters}, #{staKmDecimal}, #{staText},
#{workStartAt}, #{workEndAt}, NOW(), #{temp}, #{workTemp}

INSERT INTO pothole_work_equipment (report_no, sort_ord, equip_name, own_qty, use_qty, remark) VALUES
(#{reportNo}, #{r.sortOrd}, #{r.equipName}, #{r.ownQty}, #{r.useQty}, #{r.remark})

/* AdminPotholeMapper.insertWorkEquipmentBatch - 작업 장비 일괄 등록 */ INSERT INTO pothole_work_equipment (report_no, sort_ord, equip_name, own_qty, use_qty) VALUES
(#{reportNo}, #{r.sortOrd}, #{r.equipName}, #{r.ownQty}, #{r.useQty})

/* AdminPotholeMapper.insertWorkPersonnelBatch - 작업 인력 일괄 등록 */ INSERT INTO pothole_work_personnel (report_no, sort_ord, person_name, dept_name, labor_cost) VALUES
(#{reportNo}, #{r.sortOrd}, #{r.personName}, #{r.deptName}, #{r.laborCost})

/* AdminPotholeMapper.insertWorkMaterialBatch - 작업 자재 일괄 등록 */ INSERT INTO pothole_work_material (report_no, sort_ord, material_name, spec, unit, use_qty, remain_qty, amount) VALUES
(#{reportNo}, #{r.sortOrd}, #{r.materialName}, #{r.spec}, #{r.unit}, #{r.useQty}, #{r.remainQty}, #{r.amount})

/* AdminPotholeMapper.insertWorkScopeBatch - 작업 범위 일괄 등록 */ INSERT INTO pothole_work_scope (report_no, sort_ord, width_m, height_m, area_m2, depth_cm, span_m) VALUES
(#{reportNo}, #{r.sortOrd}, #{r.widthM}, #{r.heightM}, #{r.areaM2}, #{r.depthCm}, #{r.spanM})
mapper.select: /* AdminPotholeMapper.selectWorkEquipmentByReportNo - 작업 장비 조회 */ SELECT sort_ord AS sortOrd, equip_name AS equipName, own_qty AS ownQty, use_qty AS useQty, remark AS remark FROM pothole_work_equipment WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, id ASC

/* AdminPotholeMapper.selectWorkPersonnelByReportNo - 작업 인력 조회 */ SELECT sort_ord AS sortOrd, person_name AS personName, dept_name AS deptName, labor_cost AS laborCost FROM pothole_work_personnel WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, id ASC

/* AdminPotholeMapper.selectWorkMaterialByReportNo - 작업 자재 조회 */ SELECT sort_ord AS sortOrd, material_name AS materialName, spec AS spec, unit AS unit, use_qty AS useQty, remain_qty AS remainQty, amount AS amount FROM pothole_work_material WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, id ASC

/* AdminPotholeMapper.selectWorkScopeByReportNo - 작업 범위 조회 */ SELECT sort_ord AS sortOrd, width_m AS widthM, height_m AS heightM, area_m2 AS areaM2, depth_cm AS depthCm, span_m AS spanM FROM pothole_work_scope WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, id ASC

SELECT pp.report_no AS reportNo , pp.img_path AS imgPath , pp.img_name AS imgName , pp.sort_ord AS sortOrd FROM pothole_photo pp WHERE pp.report_no = #{reportNo} AND pp.photo_gb = #{photoGb} AND pp.is_main = 'Y' ORDER BY pp.photo_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT h.history_id AS historyId , h.report_no AS reportNo , h.action_type AS actionType , h.changed_fields AS changedFields , h.before_data AS beforeData , h.after_data AS afterData , h.action_user_id AS actionUserId , IFNULL(au.USER_NM, h.action_user_id) AS actionUserNm , h.action_memo AS actionMemo , DATE_FORMAT(h.action_datetime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS actionDatetime FROM pothole_history h LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.USER_ID = h.action_user_id AND au.USE_YN = 1 WHERE h.report_no = #{reportNo} ORDER BY h.action_datetime DESC, h.history_id DESC

SELECT p.report_no AS reportNo, DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%Y') AS reportYear, DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%m') AS reportMonth, s.site_name AS siteName, p.addr AS region,
CASE WHEN p.direction_cd = 'UP' THEN '상행' WHEN p.direction_cd = 'DOWN' THEN '하행' ELSE '' END AS directionNm,
CASE WHEN p.sta_text IS NOT NULL AND p.sta_text != '' THEN CONCAT('STA ', p.sta_text) ELSE '' END AS locationInfo,
p.detail_info AS detailInfo,
DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%m/%d') AS reportDateMmdd, DATE_FORMAT(p.work_end_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS workDate, DATE_FORMAT(p.work_end_at, '%m/%d') AS workDateMmdd, DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%H:%i') AS reportTime,
cw.cd_code_nm AS weatherNm,
DATE_FORMAT(p.work_end_at, '%H:%i') AS workTime,
cww.cd_code_nm AS workWeatherNm,
p.pavement_type_cds AS pavementTypeCds, p.occur_place_cds AS occurPlaceCds, p.lane_info AS laneInfo, p.report_remark AS reportRemark, p.work_qty AS workQty, p.convert_work_qty AS convertWorkQty, p.account_work_qty AS accountWorkQty,
ws.width_m AS widthM, ws.height_m AS heightM, ws.area_m2 AS areaM2, ws.depth_cm AS depthCm, ws.span_m AS spanM,
bf.img_path AS beforeImgPath, bf.img_name AS beforeImgName,
af.img_path AS afterImgPath, af.img_name AS afterImgName
FROM pothole p
LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_cd = p.site_cd
LEFT JOIN cd_common cw ON cw.cd_div = '007' AND cw.cd_code = p.weather_cd
LEFT JOIN cd_common cww ON cww.cd_div = '007' AND cww.cd_code = p.work_weather_cd
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.report_no, t.width_m, t.height_m, t.area_m2, t.depth_cm, t.span_m FROM pothole_work_scope t INNER JOIN ( SELECT report_no, MIN(sort_ord) AS min_sort_ord FROM pothole_work_scope GROUP BY report_no ) x ON t.report_no = x.report_no AND t.sort_ord = x.min_sort_ord ) ws ON ws.report_no = p.report_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p1.report_no, p1.img_path, p1.img_name FROM pothole_photo p1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT report_no, COALESCE( MIN(CASE WHEN is_main = 'Y' THEN sort_ord END), MIN(sort_ord) ) AS pick_sort_ord FROM pothole_photo WHERE photo_gb = 'BEFORE' GROUP BY report_no ) x ON p1.report_no = x.report_no AND p1.sort_ord = x.pick_sort_ord WHERE p1.photo_gb = 'BEFORE' ) bf ON bf.report_no = p.report_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p1.report_no, p1.img_path, p1.img_name FROM pothole_photo p1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT report_no, COALESCE( MIN(CASE WHEN is_main = 'Y' THEN sort_ord END), MIN(sort_ord) ) AS pick_sort_ord FROM pothole_photo WHERE photo_gb = 'AFTER' GROUP BY report_no ) x ON p1.report_no = x.report_no AND p1.sort_ord = x.pick_sort_ord WHERE p1.photo_gb = 'AFTER' ) af ON af.report_no = p.report_no
WHERE p.del_yn = 'N' AND p.report_no IN
#{reportNo}
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(p.report_date, '%m') ASC, p.report_date ASC, p.report_no ASC
